subcodes.first_line: This is a day of joy and expansion - joy wherefrom? From the wine of divine love in this luminous morn of expansion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روز روز نشاط و انبساط است نشاط از چه از صهبای محبت الهی در این صبح نورانی و انبساط
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God
